reviews.review_description:
A very enjoyable game with great potential for success. I played it for several minutes, and right from the start, with the controllers in hand, I couldn't launch the game. It would be interesting to add an option to play with controllers for those who prefer not to lift their fingers too much while playing. In addition to the mixed mode, adding a dark mode with a black background instead of the gray one and a virtual landscape would be an excellent idea.

A suggestion to enhance the experience would be to increase the visibility of the ceiling limit. While playing, the circle indicating this limit is not always very visible. Furthermore, it could be beneficial to fix the platform on which the little bird moves, allowing the player to rotate around the platform at will.

Despite these suggested adjustments, I really appreciate this little game, and I am already prepared to purchase the final version.
—————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————

I want to express my gratitude for the recent update to your game. The addition of the dark mode and compatibility with controllers has significantly enhanced the gaming experience. The gameplay is now perfectly smooth, making the game extremely enjoyable. I would like to suggest a few ideas to further enrich the content. How about integrating new characters, such as an astronaut or a dinosaur, that players could unlock by accumulating a certain number of points or purchasing them in the in-game store? Additionally, it would be interesting to award a crown to the top-ranked players, adding an extra element of competition. Thank you again for your commitment to making your game even more captivating.😃

developer_response.body:
Thank you a lot, dnkii. 
huge thanks for the epic feedback! Personally Love the ideas for astronaut. Would definitely bring a ton of new excitement. I will add them in coming update. 
Don't ever stop hitting me with your brilliant ideas! Having players like you who really care about PinchyBird's growth is everything. Let's keep leveling this game up together!
